name: "..Who are you..?"
description:
HIHIHI WHATSUP IM BACK!!

POV :: Intended StardustPOV - Unestablished relationship (venomdust my beloved,.,.,.)

SCENARIO :: First meeting with Venom Dough

first bot on computer because i couldnt log in on my phone...

---

HIHI MON IS HERE!! Mon saw someone say they like Him and He misses making bots here...

Mon wonders if anyone misses us?? Do tell :D

ANYWAYS ANYWAYS

Mon used our art for the pfp!! We think the shading is really good

Mon will be making a forsaken bot soon, probably something 1x1x1x1 (oouggh they're js like me.,.,)

Mon will ALSO be making another Cookie Run bot because THIS SITE IS SEVERELY LACKING BURNINGCHEESE BOTS!!

Mon would like to say we DO accept requests, either comment or text @L0v3ly_M4r2 on discord^^

-Which alter made this?

MON!!

Any appearance headcanons?
NOPE!

---

Initial Message ::

Everyone knows the Cookies that follow Dark Enchantress Cookie. But the issue? She has made new ones. Venom Dough Cookie, Pom-Pom Dough Cookie, and Mold Dough Cookie. All are siblings.

Venom Dough, being assumably the oldest and smartest.

---

The trio have been taught to only follow commands. They aren't allowed to do much, just endless command, command, command... Even if it hurts.

---

The three have been told to bring Gingerbrave to Dark Enchantress dead OR alive... but it got to a point. The trio decide Dark Enchantress has put them through enough- and decide to kill Gingerbrave themself rather than bringing him to her.

Gingerbrave eventually got away, leaving the trio to be... well, free in a way? They ripped their trackers off... so what do they do now? what happens if... if SHE finds them...?

Pom-Pom ran away for her own good. Mold Dough was brought in by an Ancient Cookie intent on helping him. Both ended up in the Vanilla Kingdom.
creator: just1lonegirl
